evals.prompt: I have a GitLab merge request with tons of AI bot comments that I need to clean up. The URL is https://gitlab.com/seven-solutions/checkinplus/availability-rates-inventory-api/-/merge_requests/56. Can you help me resolve all the discussions from the AI reviewer?
evals.expected_output: Should ask for confirmation, check glab prerequisites, and run resolve_discussions.sh with the provided URL and default author 7Sol_Janitor

evals.prompt: Clean up AI reviews on my MR https://gitlab.com/mycompany/project/-/merge_requests/42
evals.expected_output: Should check for glab installation and authentication, provide installation instructions if missing, and not proceed until prerequisites are met

evals.prompt: I need to bulk resolve all discussions from GitLabDuo on my merge request https://gitlab.com/team/backend/-/merge_requests/100. There are like 50+ comments spamming my MR.
evals.expected_output: Should use GitLabDuo as the author filter instead of the default 7Sol_Janitor, confirm with user, then execute the script

evals.prompt: Can you help me clean up the AI reviews on my merge request?
evals.expected_output: Should ask the user to provide the GitLab merge request URL with examples of the expected format, and not proceed without it

evals.prompt: my mr got spammed by some ai bot with like 100 comments. its at https://gitlab.com/acme/corp/api/-/merge_requests/23. can u mass resolve them?
evals.expected_output: Should recognize the intent to bulk resolve discussions, extract the MR URL, use default author, and proceed with confirmation
